headline: Pool Corporation's Installed-Base Economics Are Being Misread
summary: Pool Corporation is being valued like a housing cyclical, even though owner returns are driven by replacement demand, pricing discipline, and cash generation across cycles.

raw.headline: Pool Corporation's Installed-Base Economics Are Being Misread

headline: Steadfast Capital Liquidates Pool Corporation Position With $156 Million Exit
summary: This distributor supplies pool and outdoor living products to professional customers across North America, Europe, and Australia.
